analysis.consistency: The description clearly distinguishes between the standard 'very rare' crystal ball and three 'legendary' variants, detailing unique additional mechanics for each variant while noting the base scrying function remains.
analysis.quality: High quality. The mechanical effects of the legendary variants (Mind Reading, Telepathy, True Seeing) are clearly defined in terms of actions, targets, save DCs, concentration requirements, and usage limitations (like the suggestion power reset).

variants.mechanics: While scrying, can use action to cast _detect thoughts_ (DC 17) on targets within 30 ft of the sensor. No concentration needed for _detect thoughts_, but ends if _scrying_ ends.

While scrying, can communicate telepathically with targets within 30 ft of the sensor. Can use action to cast _suggestion_ (DC 17) through the sensor on one target. No concentration needed for _suggestion_, but ends if _scrying_ ends. _Suggestion_ use resets at next dawn.
While scrying, has truesight (120 ft radius) centered on the sensor.

mechanics.dc_note: Save DC for spell effects (Scrying, Detect Thoughts, Suggestion) is consistently 17.
